untranslatable_reason: Kurtosis is not available in the allowed indicators list. The signal explicitly requires 'kurtosis is decreasing' as the primary entry condition. No direct kurtosis measurement exists in the trading engine. ADX was used as a proxy for trend strength, but this does not capture the statistical distribution measure (kurtosis) that the original signal requires.
translation_notes: Signal requires kurtosis measurement which is unavailable. Substituted ADX_14 as a trend-strength proxy combined with price position relative to SMA_20 to approximate directional trend trading. This captures trend-following intent but loses the volatility/orderliness component that kurtosis decline would indicate. Manual parameter tuning recommended when kurtosis data becomes available.
